# Toique

LINE問い合わせ受付 SaaS のフロントエンドおよびバックエンドシステム。

## Architecture Overview
- Frontend: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS 4
- Backend: Bun, Hono, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL
- Auth: better-auth

## Key Concepts
- LINE Webhook Integration: Receives user queries and provides automated or manual responses.
- Dynamic Form Engine: JSON schema-driven interactive forms triggered by keywords.
- Multi-tenant support: Data isolation per tenant.

## Additional Resources
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/genzouw/toique
- Reference Repository: https://github.com/genzouw/ptasuku (private/unpublished)
- Documentation: `/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-16-toique-line-inquiry-saas-design.md`
